summary: Integration-style tests for Service using a real SQLite store (via storage.Open) and mock LLM clients, covering the full summarization lifecycle including queue behavior, channel filtering, and local-model prompt preamble

observations.text: Uses storage.Open with a temp-dir SQLite DB — tests exercise real DB schema and query behavior, not mocks; this catches storage-layer regressions automatically
TestService_SummarizeUnsummarized_StopsOnAPIError verifies that 3 messages remain unsummarized in DB after 2nd API call fails — confirms queue-stop semantics are durable, not just in-memory

TestService_SummarizeUnsummarizedForChannels_FiltersByChannel seeds two channels and confirms the non-targeted channel's message remains in the unsummarized set — validates channel-scoped filtering at storage level
TestService_LocalModelPromptPreamble inspects the captured ChatRequest.Messages[0].Content to verify localModelPreamble text is appended — tests the prompt augmentation path directly
countingMockClient implements Client with a failAfter threshold, enabling deterministic partial-failure scenarios across multi-message queues
